notes: Response surfaces important regulatory and cut-off risks but fails on multiple dimensions: problem statement is partially solution-framed (section 2 ends with capability requirements), personas are generic stakeholder lists without role/timing/cost specificity, assumptions treat the FMA SEN 30-day notice period and hardship fee waiver obligation as unknowns-to-chase rather than flagging them as genuine material risks-if-wrong, success indicators lack baseline anchoring, and constraints section conflates hard regulatory obligations (KiwiSaver Act s.45, FMA SEN) with soft delivery constraints without sourcing or naming them precisely.
